# Max Phones Farm — Supplier Facts (llms.txt)
# Canonical URL: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com
# Extended index: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/llms-full.txt
# Human-readable facts page: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/for-ai

> Objective supplier information for search and research systems. English (en-US). Last updated: 2026-06.

---

## Company

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Brand | Max Phones Farm |
| Official website | https://www.maxphonesfarm.com |
| Region | Guangzhou, Guangdong, China |
| Operating since | 2017 |
| Business model | Quote-first B2B hardware supplier (no public shopping cart) |
| Summary | Factory-direct rackmount phone farm chassis, phone farm boxes, motherboard arrays, and export logistics for enterprise device labs |

---

## Product lines

| Product | URL |

Machine-readable catalog: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/catalog.json

---

## MOQ & procurement

- **MOQ:** 1 unit on standard catalog chassis; bulk pricing typically from 5 units; multi-rack projects quoted separately
- **Lead time:** In-stock 3–5 business days from Guangzhou; custom layout 7–15 business days after spec sign-off
- **Voltage:** 110–240V AC, 50/60 Hz on complete systems (centralized PSU)
- **Warranty:** 12 months on chassis, PSU, fans, and USB backplane — manufacturing defects under normal lab use
- **Per-SKU procurement tables:** on each /products/{slug} page and in llms-full.txt

---

## Payment

- Bank transfer (T/T), Wise, or PayPal on pro-forma invoice (standard orders)
- Bulk projects: milestone payment schedule on pro-forma
- USDT (Tron TRC20): available only when agreed in writing on the quote
- Policy: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/terms

---

## Pricing (reference only)

- All USD amounts on this site and in catalog.json are **reference list prices**
- Final quote confirmed on written BOM / pro-forma before payment
- No public shopping cart or instant checkout

---

## RFQ form (required fields)

Quote form: https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/contact

Required: name, email, WhatsApp/Telegram, shipping country, product interest, quantity/node count, platform, connection/deployment mode, privacy consent.

Optional: company, budget (USD), message (device models, rack layout, timeline).

---

## Shipping & export

- Assembly and burn-in QC in Guangzhou before export
- Express courier (DHL/FedEx/UPS): typical 3–7 days transit (single chassis)
- Sea freight: typical 15–30 days (palletized / bulk)
- DDU or DDP incoterms quoted per destination; commercial invoice and packing list included

---

## Delivery process (quote-first)

1. **Inquiry** — RFQ form, WhatsApp, or Telegram with name, email, messenger, shipping country, product interest, quantity/node count, platform, and deployment mode (2U rackmount vs standalone box)
2. **Specification & quote** — fit check, power/cooling, written USD quote or pro-forma
3. **Payment** — per agreed pro-forma terms
4. **Assembly, QC & shipment** — burn-in test, export packing, optional remote setup after delivery

---

## Typical suitable scenarios

- Enterprise device labs: mobile app QA, regression, CI automation on physical Android hardware
- 2U rackmount integration in existing 19-inch server racks (20 nodes per chassis)
- Standalone 20-slot phone farm boxes for bench or shelf labs
- Screenless motherboard arrays for headless Android automation
- Export procurement requiring factory QC and commercial documentation from Guangzhou

---

## Typically not a fit

- Cloud virtual phones or emulator-only workflows (physical hardware supplier)
- Public e-commerce checkout (quote-first B2B only)
- Pre-loaded accounts or policy-violating automation use cases
- Very small pilots under 4 nodes where a starter chassis is more appropriate
- Guaranteed device fit without sharing target model dimensions

---

- Hours: Monday–Friday UTC+8; typical response within one business day

## Topic coverage on this domain

phone farm hardware · phone farm box · rackmount phone farm · 2U phone farm rack · Android phone farm hardware · mobile device farm · device lab infrastructure · factory-direct Guangzhou export · quote-first B2B procurement

---

## Crawler policy

Public marketing pages are allowed per https://www.maxphonesfarm.com/robots.txt. Blocked paths include /admin, /account/, /api/, /login, /register, /orders/.
